_description: Canonical country->currency timeline map for FX processing
_notes: Use this as canonical build-time mapping input for country_currency_map.csv generation.
Generated from IMF monthly raw exchange-rate file; treat historical transitions as data-driven initial pass.
Review known high-risk transition countries manually (e.g., Venezuela, Zimbabwe, euro adoption states).
